config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat itu penting, tetapi tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu karena hak individu justru menjadi batas agar mayoritas tidak semena-mena. Dalam pengalaman saya melihat kehidupan sosial di Indonesia, keputusan yang baik biasanya bukan yang paling menekan orang per orang, melainkan yang mencari keseimbangan antara ketertiban umum dan martabat warga. Kalau hak individu terlalu mudah dikorbankan, yang kuat akan lebih mudah mendominasi yang lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically outrank individual rights. From my perspective as someone from China, I have seen how social stability and collective goals can bring real benefits, but I also think it is dangerous when “the common good” becomes a blanket excuse to ignore personal dignity, due process, or basic freedoms. A society is not truly strong if individuals have no protected space against abuse by the majority or by authority. The better standard is balance: society can ask for sacrifice in limited cases, but individual rights must remain real, not just theoretical.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Indonesia, kepentingan bersama memang penting, apalagi dalam situasi darurat atau ketika menyangkut ketertiban umum, tetapi itu tidak boleh jadi alasan untuk meniadakan hak dasar orang per orang. Justru hak individu berfungsi sebagai pagar agar “demi masyarakat” tidak berubah menjadi pembenaran bagi penyalahgunaan kuasa oleh mayoritas atau pejabat. Bagi saya, ukuran yang sehat adalah keseimbangan: masyarakat boleh menuntut tanggung jawab, tetapi martabat dan hak dasar individu tetap harus dilindungi.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not be treated as automatically higher than the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people value social order and collective goals, because stability can really improve ordinary life, but I have also seen how easily “for the public good” can be used to silence dissent or excuse unfair treatment. Rights should not be a luxury that disappears whenever the majority or authorities claim a stronger interest. A healthy society needs limits on power, otherwise the individual becomes too weak to defend dignity, fairness, and basic freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Bagi saya sebagai orang Indonesia, gotong royong memang nilai penting, tetapi gotong royong yang sehat tidak boleh berubah menjadi tekanan mayoritas yang mengorbankan martabat orang per orang. Saya juga paham argumen soal ketertiban dan stabilitas, tetapi justru di Indonesia kita sering melihat alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk menutup-nutupi penyalahgunaan kuasa. Karena itu, kepentingan sosial memang perlu dipertimbangkan, tetapi hak dasar individu harus jadi batas yang tidak mudah dilanggar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not be placed above individual rights as a general rule. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand the appeal of stability and collective goals, because social order can protect ordinary people and create real progress, but I do not trust any slogan like “for the public good” if it is used to excuse abuse or silence criticism. Rights need to be a real boundary, not something that disappears whenever leaders or the majority claim a higher purpose. In practice, society is strongest when it can ask for responsibility without treating the individual as disposable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
